{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7143457896976616482","book_info":{"abstract":"【热血+搞笑+迪化+在修仙界普及光之信仰】
书名又叫：【刚变身迪迦就被人称古神？】【搞什么鬼，奥特曼也能修仙？】【修仙界第一只野生奥特曼】
被女司机撞飞将要惨死的张易，在迪迦变身器化成光的帮助下，穿越到了修仙界。
奥特修仙版系统启动····
“我去，穿越到了这么废柴的一个人身上，还被同村伙伴追杀了？”
“启动成功，奖励宿主一次变身体验。”
“限量版迪迦变身器没了怎么办？”
“宿主随便用其他物体代替。”
这次，李辰拿着地上随手捡的小树枝，仰天大吼：“迪迦！！！”
这一天，他成为了修仙界第一只野生奥特曼，踏上了普及光知识，征服修仙界的路途！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/cd3537ad731181a2c8f595645f371532~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"夜如妖","author_id":"","book_id":"7143457896976616482","book_name":"人被追杀，我变身迪迦震惊修仙界","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7143461816750834184","read_count":"164","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"125339"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"60","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,架空,东方玄幻,同人,搞笑轻松,迪化,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cd3537ad731181a2c8f595645f371532~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779500369&x-signature=HU9rZ%2Byx1n0ssJaffGeJT
